name: libsbmlnetwork

metadata.name: libsbmlnetwork
metadata.summary: Couldn't find suitable artifact for libsbmlnetwork==0.4.1

documentation: LibSBML Network is a portable library for systems/synthetic biologist to work with the Layout and Render extensions of SBML models. It enables the users to straightforwardly read, manipulate, and write and also automatically generate the information about the Layout and Render extensions of an SBML model.
